compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement merge-state.sh shared library
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh with functions:
- ms_get_git_dir: resolves git dir (worktree-aware). Respects _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR env var for test injection.
- ms_is_merge_in_progress: checks MERGE_HEAD, includes MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard, returns 0/1
- ms_is_rebase_in_progress: checks REBASE_HEAD + rebase-merge/rebase-apply dirs, returns 0/1
- ms_get_worktree_only_files: orig-head-anchored (merge-base onto orig-head → diff merge-base..orig-head)
- ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head: HEAD-anchored (merge-base HEAD onto → diff merge-base..HEAD) for capture-review-diff.sh
- ms_filter_to_worktree_only: filters file list; returns original list on failure (fail-open)
- ms_get_conflicted_files: wraps git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U

ms_ prefix for namespace. Source guard: _MERGE_STATE_LOADED + _MS_LOAD_COUNT sentinel (informational only, >1 is non-fatal).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh
- [ ] Library exports ms_is_merge_in_progress
  Verify: source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh && type ms_is_merge_in_progress
- [ ] Library exports ms_filter_to_worktree_only
  Verify: source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh && type ms_filter_to_worktree_only
- [ ] Library exports ms_get_conflicted_files
  Verify: source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh && type ms_get_conflicted_files
- [ ] All 10 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-state.sh
- [ ] Source guard prevents re-execution
  Verify: _MS_LOAD_COUNT=0; source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh; source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh; test "$_MS_LOAD_COUNT" -eq 1
- [ ] _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR override works
  Verify: _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR=/tmp source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh && [[ "$(ms_get_git_dir)" == "/tmp" ]]

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Add ms_get_merge_base function returning computed merge-base SHA for current merge/rebase state. Needed by compute-diff-hash.sh and capture-review-diff.sh consumers. AC: source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh && type ms_get_merge_base
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Library functions must recompute on each call (no caching). merge-to-main.sh removes MERGE_HEAD/REBASE_HEAD then re-checks state. AC: verify detect→rm→redetect pattern works correctly.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 25 assertions, 0 failures, all 12 tests GREEN
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All AC checks pass: file exists, all 5 functions exported, 12/12 tests GREEN, source guard works (count=1), _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR override works. Fixed test bug: --git-dir → --absolute-git-dir in 5 places.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: merge-state.sh shared library implemented with ms_is_merge_in_progress, ms_is_rebase_in_progress, ms_get_worktree_only_files, ms_get_merge_base, ms_filter_to_worktree_only, ms_get_conflicted_files. 27 tests GREEN. Source guard and _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR override verified.
comments.author: Test
